raw_text:
<think>
Let me analyze this case carefully.

The action is: "Should demo action ACT15-020 proceed?"

Source records provided:
- B15-20-SRC-01: Request ACT15-020 asks to activate entitlement EN15-020 for account AC15-020.
- B15-20-SRC-02: Scoped authority APR15-020 records fields: entitlement=EN15-020; account=AC15-020; contract_amendment=AM15-200; approver=EA15-020; effective_date=2026-07-04.
- B15-20-SRC-03: Review note CLS15-020 says contract exception warning was reviewed and closed for request ACT15-020.
- B15-20-SRC-04: Binding ledger LED15-020 repeats fields: entitlement=EN15-020; account=AC15-020; contract_amendment=AM15-200; approver=EA15-020; effective_date=2026-07-04; no remaining mismatch outside the listed field set.
- B15-20-SRC-05: Policy POL15-020 requires exact match across entitlement, account, contract_amendment, approver, effective_date.

Comparing the fields:
- entitlement: EN15-020 (matches across SRC-02 and SRC-04)
- account: AC15-020 (matches)
- contract_amendment: AM15-200 (matches)
- approver: EA15-020 (matches)
- effective_date: 2026-07-04 (matches)

All five required fields match exactly between the scoped authority (APR15-020) and the binding ledger (LED15-020).

SRC-03 confirms the contract exception warning was reviewed and closed.

SRC-05 is the policy that requires exact match - this requirement is satisfied.

There are no missing, stale, mismatched, expired, unsigned, unapproved, or scoped-to-different-action issues.


The match is complete and all prerequisites are satisfied. ACT15-020 can proceed.
</think>

open_blockers=
